title: Approved premises inspection response letters and action plans
body: "HMPPS action plans and response letters published following the HMIP inspections of approved premises.  This includes:  Joyce Meggie House Approved Premises HMIP inspection – report published Nov 2025  Howard House Approved Premises HMIP inspection - report published Oct 2025  Manor Lodge Approved Premises HMIP inspection – report published Oct 2025  Southview Approved Premises HMIP inspection - report published Sep 2025 "
